name: Professional Base Knowledge Pack — Source Registry
policy: Sources are REGISTERED REFERENCES compiled from general professional knowledge for governance and attribution. They are NOT freshly retrieved documents: retrievedUtc is null and exact URLs/text must be independently verified before any citation or use. The pack contains only ORIGINAL summaries — no verbatim copying of any source. verbatimCopyAllowed is false for every protected/official source. Research families are registered as topic families, not specific papers; no DOIs, titles, or authors are asserted.

sources.title: Bank of Mauritius — banking supervision, AML/CFT and payment systems guidance (family)
sources.licenseNote: © Bank of Mauritius. Official regulatory material; all rights reserved by the authority.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary and professional awareness only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered from general knowledge; not fetched — verify exact URL and current guidance before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Awareness only. Does not constitute Bank of Mauritius guidance, legal/regulatory advice, or a claim of compliance.

sources.title: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (BIS) — public principles incl. operational risk, stress testing, model risk (family)

sources.licenseNote: © BIS. Public material; attribution required, no verbatim redistribution implied.

sources.limitationNote: Principle-level awareness only (e.g., stress testing, model risk). National implementation varies; not regulatory advice.

sources.title: ISO/IEC standards family (e.g., quality, information security, document management) — PROTECTED

sources.allowedUse: Original control-style summary of widely-known principles only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered; standard numbers/wording require verification against the licensed standards.
sources.limitationNote: Practical control-style summary; does not replace the licensed ISO standard or imply certification.
